/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX12.3.sdk -mmacosx-version-min=12.1 -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -o libquadedge.dylib -install_name @rpath/libquadedge.dylib CMakeFiles/quadedge.dir/Users/chaeyoon/Local_Git/Starlab/dnn/NearestNeighbor/ENN/C_Subidivision/Delaunay_Linf/externals/quadedge-basic/quadedge.cpp.o  -framework OpenGL -framework OpenGL -framework GLUT -framework Cocoa /opt/homebrew/lib/libboost_filesystem-mt.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libboost_system-mt.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libboost_iostreams-mt.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libboost_atomic-mt.dylib
